labels: sorghum field plot with no visible panicles or all panicles still in boot stage, no flowering
sorghum field plot with less than 25 percent of plants showing panicles with extruded yellow anthers, most plants not yet flowering
sorghum field plot with approximately 50 percent of plants showing yellow anthers on panicles, half of the plot is flowering
sorghum field plot with more than 75 percent of plants flowering, most panicles have visible anthers, some starting to dry
sorghum field plot fully past flowering, all panicles done with anthesis, grain filling has begun, no fresh anthers visible
